recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.ingredients: Spaghetti, Eggs, Bacon, Parmesan Cheese, Black Pepper
recipes.instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package directions. Fry bacon until crispy. Mix eggs with parmesan. Combine hot pasta with bacon, then stir in egg mixture off heat. Season with black pepper.

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
recipes.ingredients: Romaine Lettuce, Croutons, Parmesan Cheese, Caesar Dressing, Lemon
recipes.instructions: Chop romaine lettuce. Toss with caesar dressing. Top with croutons and parmesan cheese. Squeeze lemon juice over top.

recipes.title: Grilled Chicken Breast
recipes.ingredients: Chicken Breast, Olive Oil, Garlic, Lemon, Herbs, Salt, Pepper
recipes.instructions: Marinate chicken in olive oil, garlic, lemon, and herbs for 30 minutes. Grill on medium-high heat for 6-7 minutes per side. Season with salt and pepper.

recipes.title: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipes.ingredients: Mixed Vegetables, Soy Sauce, Ginger, Garlic, Sesame Oil, Rice
recipes.instructions: Heat sesame oil in wok. Stir fry vegetables with garlic and ginger. Add soy sauce. Serve over steamed rice.
